member.name: F:EnterpriseTemplate.Shared.Constants.PolicyNames.PermissionPrefix
member.summary: Prefix used by dynamic permission policies.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Shared.Options.ActiveDirectoryOptions.Domain
member.summary: Gets or sets the AD domain.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Shared.Options.ActiveDirectoryOptions.LdapPath
member.summary: Gets or sets the LDAP path.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Shared.Options.AuthenticationProviderOptions.ActiveProvider
member.summary: Gets or sets the active authentication provider.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Shared.Options.CacheOptions.Provider
member.summary: Gets or sets the cache provider name.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Shared.Options.DatabaseOptions.DefaultConnection
member.summary: Gets or sets the default SQL Server connection string.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Shared.Options.EmailOptions.Sender
member.summary: Gets or sets the default sender address.

member.name: P:EnterpriseTemplate.Shared.Options.JwtOptions.SigningKey
member.summary: Gets or sets the signing key.
